tldr_zh: OpenAI模型突破幾何學難題，同時傳出IPO消息；Nvidia與Anthropic展現AI市場潛力，但資安與模型可靠性挑戰仍存。
tldr_en: OpenAI model solves geometry problem and eyes IPO; Nvidia and Anthropic show AI market potential, yet security and model reliability challenges persist.

items.title_zh: OpenAI模型解決離散幾何學80年難題，推翻核心猜想
items.title_en: OpenAI Model Solves 80-Year Discrete Geometry Problem, Disproving Core Conjecture
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的一個AI模型成功解決了存在80年的單位距離問題，推翻了離散幾何學中的一個主要猜想。這項突破標誌著人工智慧在數學研究領域達到新的里程碑，展現AI驅動科學發現的巨大潛力。
items.summary_en: An OpenAI AI model successfully solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry. This breakthrough marks a new milestone for artificial intelligence in mathematical research, demonstrating AI's immense potential for scientific discovery.

items.title_zh: OpenAI傳將秘密提交IPO申請，預計最快本週五進行
items.title_en: OpenAI Reportedly to Confidentially File for IPO as Early as This Friday
items.summary_zh: 據報導，領先的人工智慧公司OpenAI正準備秘密提交首次公開募股（IPO）申請，預計最快將於本週五進行。此舉將是AI產業的一大里程碑，可能為AI新創公司開啟新的融資途徑。
items.summary_en: Leading AI company OpenAI is reportedly preparing to confidentially file for an Initial Public Offering (IPO), with expectations of doing so as early as this Friday. This move would be a significant milestone for the AI industry, potentially opening new funding avenues for AI startups.

items.title_zh: Nvidia執行長黃仁勳預測，AI代理CPU將開創2000億美元新市場
items.title_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Predicts $200B New Market for AI Agent CPUs
items.summary_zh: Nvidia執行長黃仁勳表示，他已為公司找到一個「全新」的2000億美元市場，即用於AI代理的中央處理器（CPU）。這項預測突顯了Nvidia在AI硬體領域的持續擴張野心，並預示AI代理將成為未來科技發展的關鍵驅動力。
items.summary_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated he has found a 'brand new' $200 billion market for the company: CPUs for AI agents. This prediction highlights Nvidia's continuous expansion ambitions in AI hardware and suggests AI agents will be a key driver of future technological development.

items.title_zh: Anthropic預計將迎來首個獲利季度，營收有望翻倍至109億美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Anticipates First Profitable Quarter, Revenue Expected to Double to $10.9 Billion
items.summary_zh: 人工智慧公司Anthropic向投資者透露，預計其第二季度營收將翻倍至約109億美元，並將迎來首次獲利季度。這標誌著大型AI模型開發商在商業化道路上取得重要進展，證明其技術投資正轉化為實質收益。
items.summary_en: AI company Anthropic has informed investors it expects to more than double its revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter, anticipating its first profitable quarter. This marks significant progress for large AI model developers on their path to commercialization, demonstrating that their technology investments are translating into substantial returns.

items.title_zh: Intuit為專注AI發展將裁員逾3000人，加速轉型步伐
items.title_en: Intuit to Lay Off Over 3,000 Employees to Refocus on AI Development
items.summary_zh: 軟體公司Intuit宣布將裁員超過3000名員工，以重新聚焦於人工智慧的發展。此舉反映了AI技術對傳統軟體產業的深遠影響，以及企業為適應AI時代而進行的策略性轉型。
items.summary_en: Software company Intuit announced it will lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on artificial intelligence development. This move reflects the profound impact of AI technology on the traditional software industry and the strategic transformations companies are undertaking to adapt to the AI era.

items.title_zh: 微軟研究指出，先進AI模型處理長流程文件任務仍不可靠
items.title_en: Microsoft Research: Advanced AI Models Unreliable for Long-Process Document Tasks
items.summary_zh: 微軟研究院發表論文指出，儘管AI代理和大型語言模型（LLM）日益普及，但在處理長流程委派式文件任務時，仍難以維持內容的完整性與準確性。這項研究提醒企業在將關鍵知識工作交由AI處理時，需謹慎評估其可靠性。
items.summary_en: Microsoft Research published a paper indicating that despite the increasing prevalence of AI agents and Large Language Models (LLMs), they still struggle to maintain content integrity and accuracy when handling long-process delegated document tasks. This research cautions businesses to carefully evaluate the reliability of AI when entrusting it with critical knowledge work.

items.title_zh: Anthropic悄悄修補Claude Code沙箱繞過漏洞，引發研究人員批評
items.title_en: Anthropic Quietly Patches Claude Code Sandbox Bypass Vulnerabilities, Drawing Criticisms
items.summary_zh: 研究人員發現，Anthropic在五個月內悄悄修補了其AI助理工具Claude Code的兩個沙箱繞過漏洞，卻未曾公開提醒用戶。此舉引發批評，認為Anthropic將廣大開發商和企業用戶置於潛在攻擊風險中，凸顯AI產品資安透明度的重要性。
items.summary_en: Researchers discovered that Anthropic quietly patched two sandbox bypass vulnerabilities in its AI assistant tool, Claude Code, over five months without public notification. This drew criticism, as it potentially exposed numerous developers and enterprise users to attack risks, highlighting the importance of transparency in AI product security.

items.title_zh: SpaceX提交史上最大IPO申請，揭露xAI去年燒錢64億美元
items.title_en: SpaceX Files for Potentially Largest IPO Ever, Reveals xAI Burned $6.4 Billion Last Year
items.summary_zh: 馬斯克旗下太空探索科技公司（SpaceX）已正式提交IPO申請，這可能成為史上最大規模的首次公開募股。文件中揭露，馬斯克的AI公司xAI在2025年燒錢64億美元，並計劃未來三年再投入28億美元購買天然氣渦輪機，顯示其在AI領域的巨大投入。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX has formally filed for an IPO, which could become the largest initial public offering ever. The filing revealed that Musk's AI company, xAI, burned $6.4 billion in 2025 and plans to invest an additional $2.8 billion in natural gas turbines over the next three years, indicating its massive commitment to the AI sector.

items.title_zh: GitHub遭供應鏈攻擊，近3800個內部儲存庫原始碼外洩
items.title_en: GitHub Hit by Supply Chain Attack, Nearly 3,800 Internal Repositories Leaked
items.summary_zh: GitHub證實其內部近3,800個原始碼儲存庫遭到未經授權的存取，起因是一名員工裝置安裝了惡意的VS Code擴充套件。這起事件被懷疑是針對JavaScript開源工具集TanStack的供應鏈攻擊連鎖效應，凸顯了開發工具鏈的資安風險。
items.summary_en: GitHub confirmed unauthorized access to nearly 3,800 of its internal source code repositories, stemming from a malicious VS Code extension installed on an employee's device. This incident is suspected to be a ripple effect of a supply chain attack targeting the TanStack JavaScript open-source toolkit, highlighting security risks within the developer toolchain.

items.title_zh: 台灣資安署擴大資安長共識營，首邀五院建立資安治理共識
items.title_en: Taiwan's Cybersecurity Agency Expands CISO Consensus Camp, Invites Five Branches of Government
items.summary_zh: 數位發展部資通安全署擴大舉辦「政府機關資安長共識營」，首度邀請總統府、國安會及立、司、考、監五院資安長共同參與。此舉旨在強化國家資安聯防體系，將防禦範圍從行政體系擴展至全政府層次，以應對日益嚴峻的資安挑戰。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs' Cybersecurity Administration expanded its 'Government Agency CISO Consensus Camp,' inviting CISOs from the Presidential Office, National Security Council, and the five branches of government for the first time. This initiative aims to strengthen national cybersecurity defenses, extending protection from the executive branch to the entire government, in response to increasingly severe cybersecurity challenges.

items.title_zh: Anthropic與OpenAI將AI政策爭議帶入期中選舉，影響科技法規
items.title_en: Anthropic and OpenAI Bring AI Policy Disputes to Midterm Elections, Influencing Tech Regulations
items.summary_zh: 兩大AI巨頭Anthropic和OpenAI將其在AI政策上的分歧帶入了期中選舉，透過政治行動委員會（Super PAC）等方式影響科技法規。這顯示AI公司正積極參與政治遊說，試圖塑造有利於自身發展的監管環境。
items.summary_en: AI giants Anthropic and OpenAI are bringing their disagreements over AI policy into the midterm elections, influencing tech regulations through Super PACs and other means. This indicates that AI companies are actively engaging in political lobbying, attempting to shape a regulatory environment favorable to their development.

items.title_zh: 美國起訴古巴前總統勞爾·卡斯楚，涉1996年擊落飛機謀殺案
items.title_en: US Indicts Former Cuban President Raúl Castro for 1996 Plane Shootdown Murders
items.summary_zh: 美國已起訴古巴前總統勞爾·卡斯楚，指控他涉嫌1996年擊落兩架飛機並謀殺美國公民。古巴現任總統稱這些指控是「政治操弄」。此事件再次加劇了美古兩國之間的緊張關係。
items.summary_en: The United States has indicted former Cuban President Raúl Castro, accusing him of murder in connection with the 1996 downing of two planes that killed U.S. nationals. Cuba's current president called the charges a 'political maneuver,' further escalating tensions between the two countries.
